focus_intent: Iteration 7: PATTERN REPRODUCED. Rank-2 ZZ-FM r=1 QBC triad (multi-agent + git-index + verify-head) on real WK_C180 gives 32pp quantum advantage (classical 0.49 vs real 0.17). Noise model v3: depth-34 ZZ-FM noise pushes DOWN below sim (5-8pp) — confirmed twice. Budget 78.41s of 150s remaining; cache+prewarm held through both audits.
